positive: A whimsical, stylized forest scene dominated by glowing bioluminescent flora and massive, intricately detailed jungle leaves. Focus on a stylized, majestic raccoon figure sitting among the plants, looking curious. The aesthetic should be a blend of Art Nouveau patterns and contemporary minimalist graphic novel style, utilizing deep emerald greens, royal sapphire blues, and accented by luminous neon cyan and gold highlights. Strong, dramatic chiaroscuro lighting to emphasize silhouettes and textures. The composition must be perfectly centered and highly symmetrical, creating a repeating pattern element ideal for apparel repeat prints. Minimalist composition, flat vectors, high contrast, clean lines, suitable for screen printing.
